items.title: Buffett Vs. S&P 500: Will Oracle Of Omaha's Last Year As Berkshire CEO Go Down As Underperformance?
items.description: Warren Buffett and Berkshire Hathaway have beaten the S&P 500 in three of the last four years. In Buffett's last year as CEO, the conglomerate trails the market index.
